summary: Smoke testing of FS Soluções Preditiva backend (15 API checks) and frontend (login, sidebar, all 8 nav links, machines page). All critical paths working. Backend seeded correctly (1 plant, 11 defects, 238 machines). Auth works via Bearer token in localStorage 'fs_token'. Excel imports for both machines (TODAS MAQUINAS.xlsx -> 291 rows processed) and measurements (template_overall_vibracao.xlsx -> 5 inserted) succeed. Diagnostic creation correctly updates machine status (ESF-0001 -> A1).
passed: POST /api/auth/login with admin@fssolucoes.com/admin123 returns token (field name: 'token')
GET /api/dashboard returns all required keys: total_machines=238, status_dist, health_index=100.0, top_defects, monthly_evolution, failure_ranking, total_diagnostics
GET /api/auth/me returns user payload via Bearer
POST /api/machines creates machine; duplicate TAG returns 400 'TAG já cadastrada'
POST /api/plants creates child unidade; DELETE /api/plants/{id} returns 200
POST /api/diagnostics creates diagnostic and updates machine.status (ESF-0001 status now A1)
POST /api/machines/import accepts TODAS MAQUINAS.xlsx (skipped=291 since TAGs already in DB)
Frontend login redirects to /dashboard; sidebar toggle works; all 8 nav links (Dashboard, Plantas, Maquinas, Vibracao, Termografia, Defeitos, Diagnostico, Usuarios) navigate without errors
Frontend Maquinas page lists 240 machines with TAG, status badges (OK/A1), tipo (VIBRACAO/TERMOGRAFIA) after data loads
Frontend uses Bearer auth from localStorage fs_token correctly

failed.issue: Endpoints require the FULL Pydantic model payload; partial body returns 422 (validation error). Not a functional bug if frontend always sends full body, but worth confirming frontend update flows pass complete payloads.
Single-machine GET endpoint not implemented (405 Method Not Allowed). Frontend likely fetches list and filters client-side, so not blocking, but worth noting.

action_items: Optional: implement GET /api/machines/{id} for single-record fetches
Optional: support partial PATCH semantics for /machines and /plants updates, OR ensure frontend always sends full model
